18x2 Beyond Youthful Days

青春18x2 君へと続く道

7.5
2024MOVIEReleased

Synopsis

Having lost his job and the company he built, a 36-year-old man at rock bottom goes on a wistful solo trip to Japan in search of the love he left behind.
